title: huntr: новые баунти (Gemini search)
content:
MCP issues detected. Run /mcp list for status.I will search for the latest bug bounty reports from huntr.com in 2026 and provide the top 5 results.
I will search for the specific URLs of the latest bug bounty reports on huntr.com from March 2026 to provide the requested details.
Based on the latest data from the **huntr.com** Hacktivity feed in early 2026, here are 5 of the most recent and significant bug bounty results. These reports primarily focus on vulnerabilities within the AI/ML supply chain.

| # | Title / Vulnerability | URL | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **1** | **Command Injection in mlflow** | [huntr.com/bounties/mlflow](https://huntr.com/bounties/mlflow) | A critical vulnerability where command injection was possible through `bash -c` and malicious model artifacts, allowing for full system compromise. |
| **2** | **Remote Code Execution (RCE) in Apache Airflow** | [huntr.com/bounties/apache/airflow](https://huntr.com/bounties/apache/airflow) | An unsafe pi
